reviews.review_description: Devs, please, I beg you, let us skip the parts where you’re talked at by Greg. I want to do the tasks but end up turning it off because it’s boring to stand there.
Sorry to say as taskmaster fan this game is a disappointment the controls are really awkward and some of the tasks are really bad, it's only short not surprised that they reduced it to 11.99
Why on earth does the environment move when you raise or lower your head? No other game does this and it is vomit inducing. Can only stomach about 5 minutes of playtime.

developer_response.body: Thanks for letting us know. The latest update addresses this issue - it focuses on the player rig and physics which have caused some players varying levels of motion sickness and discomfort. Hopefully, it means you can enjoy the game as intended.

reviews.review_description:
The only thing that would make this fantastic adaptation of the popular game show even better for me would be a local multi player mode and it would be so obvious too because the oculus would work almost exactly like it's in the show only the candidate currently playing would be able to read the letters and see what's going on unless people are streaming it to their TV 
Maybe the great great team behind this might consider adding local multi player 🙏 even if they don't well earned 5🌟

Huge fan of Taskmaster, not a huge fan of this. The tasks in this game don't have quite the genius of the TV Taskmaster tasks, and many of them are very frustrating (although I'm many TV tasks are too for the contestants) to perfoem. The main issue here is the object physics that don't stack or interact with other objects as they should and are harder to manipulate than in real life making for a long frustrating time when you have e.g. 20 min to stack glitchy items for goals I won't spoil. I was skeptic of this game but wanted to give it a go all the same, in the end I was unfortunately right.

When youre stationary and move your head around the background and stationary items move a bit in a really choppy way. Instantly made me dizzy and I couldn't play anymore. I was also disappointed with the low fidelity in a number of spots and common vr pitfalls like items moving through each other etc.hope they improve the playability in the future.

developer_response.body: Hello! This isn’t expected or known behaviour and we’d love the opportunity to troubleshoot this with you and work out what might be going on - we’d love it if you could join our discord to give us a little more information so that we can get you playing as intended! Thanks!

reviews.review_description: It's unplayable on my Q3, due to poor controller tracking and consistently placing the VR floor beneath my real floor so I can't pick things up (yes I have tried the height setting, repeatedly). I don't have these issues with any other game. The dev has failed this task: no points.

developer_response.body: Hi there! We're sorry to hear your experience hasn't been up the expected standard, and this is certainly not the expected play experience - we released a patch this week addressing a large number of reported issues, and are continuing to work on improvements to the game - you can also reach out to us on discord and our team and community can help troubleshoot the cause of these issues!

reviews.review_title: Seems like it could be fun
reviews.review_description: Started playing this but it’s so glitchy. The graphics flash and flicker constantly. Walking / teleporting randomly stop working and have to quit and start again. Grab function doesn’t work well for far away objects the just drop to the floor. Can see potential and love the concept but haven’t been able to get through even the practice task!

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for your review! We would love to troubleshoot this for you as we have not seen reports of this feedback from other players at this time. If you could try a few of these steps, we can make some progress in getting this sorted for you as soon as possible.

Make sure to choose whether you're playing seated or standing, and if you change between either, please ensure you update these settings in the settings menu.
If you are struggling to reach objects due to limited play space or other reasons, we suggest enabling reach assist in the settings to help with this.

Please ensure the Taskmaster VR app has the latest update applied (version 1.0.5).
If you are playing on Quest 2, for optimal performance, we recommend playing without screen sharing or screen recording.
If performance problems persist, please try reinstalling Taskmaster VR to ensure the game is fully installed and running correctly.

Please get back to us and we will do our best to get Taskmaster VR running smoothly for you!

reviews.review_title: Bad game, wish I got a refund
reviews.review_description: I gave the Taskmaster VR game a second chance after writing my first review and now I've spent too much time on the game for me to get a refund. Almost ALL the minigames I play I get ones or twos because most of the tasks are impossible to do or understand. For example, the one clock game where you punch the times but it's so hard to understand and when I do it correctly I'm so confused on what I did.  Plus the pickup assist is very hard to use; I'm YANKING an object trying to pick it up but it's NOT WORKING and by the time I am holding the object my arm hurts. Also the minigame where you control a robot w/peas In a Martini Glass, clink the other glasses and deliver at least one pea to Greg's statue, the robot controller is very stupid because you can't move while the robot is moving and you can't turn while the robot is turning. There is WAY MORE for me to complain about but it is so sad that the Taskmaster VR game ended up like this because I love the Taskmaster series and I will probably never be playing this game again but it's too late for a refund.

developer_response.body: Hi! We are sorry you've had this experience with Taskmaster VR! We have a very welcoming Discord where contestants share strategies to boost their scores and solve the tasks in Taskmaster VR. We can also provide support for technical issues there so we can hopefully resolve any you may have. Please Join us there as we would love to help! https://discord.gg/mHGM3SsRjD

reviews.review_description: Absolutely love this game. I feel bad that it has low reviews as the recent update fixed all these problems and the game runs great now. 10/10 for a fan of Taskmaster!

Cracking game here. Lots variety to fill the time with. Don’t really know the show and had a blast anyways. Massive potential for growing number of items to make tasks with. Already loads I could get stuck into. Be keen to see what else comes out. Hope so!
This is absolutely fantastic, well done to the dev team!

reviews.review_title: Fun game, clunky controls and low res
reviews.review_description:
Bringing the concept to VR is great and fun, but I had a hard time performing tasks due to the clunky controls. I tried to change the control settings to see which one works better, but still they feel half baked. Also the resolution of the characters looks low.
On other hand, please developers consider bringing Tipping Point and The Chase to VR as well, thanks!

developer_response.body: Hi there! We released a patch this week addressing a large number of reported issues that were affecting some users and not others - hopefully this most recent update solves your issues, and you can play the game as we intended! We'd also encourage you to join our discord to share your feedback with the devs to help us continue to work on improvements to the game!

reviews.review_description: Such a mad game. The humour is very British. It’s weirdly addictive. Surprising VR games that I’ve not seen in other content. Caught a cool vid from a streamer who did a play through and sung its praises. Not wrong! Some tasks solid but very silly. If you like silly, get on it!

developer_response.body: Thankyou so much! "Weird and British" is the highest compliment you could give us!

reviews.review_description:
What a game. 

Loving the replayability. Good for pick up and put down. Much better long playability since the update too. 

Got friends on it at a party so we could share round the craft mode. A little on/off all the time sharing out the headset, but the funnies made it worth it. 🔥

Got this bad boy in the discount last week as a punt and haha what a bunch of fun this has been! 
New to VR and a fan of the show but was a little unsure whether it would do the show justice. But its fab! Game is a great one loyal to the show but also VRy enough to make sure its right for this context. Still loads to get through so a lonh way from review the whole game, but so far its been a delight for my weekend. Thanks!

Taskmaster VR is clearly a love letter (Task Card) to the TV series - from the voice acting of Greg Davies and Alex Horne to all the Easter eggs - it’s a really frustratingly fun game to play and be challenged by the wit and humour you expect from the show. I may not be able to get 5 points in every task (yet) but it’s 5 stars for the game!

Absolutely amazing to play this with little alex hooorne! Can’t believe that I can dive around the house and play tasks and get judged by Greg! Mega for Taskmaster fan here. Don’t know about anyone else, but I absolutely adore it! Gameplay is so beautiful. 😂😭🤩

This is a wizard of oz kind of game.
Its the kind of game where you find yourself in kansas and you think you understand what you’re dealing with. 
You find yourself dealing with aunty may kind of introductions and you think you have the measure of things
But your version of Toto was there barking at you warning you that a hurricane was coming.
And all of a sudden you’re in a Taskmaster version of Oz dealing with ABSOLUTELY CRAZY tasks and mini games. 
And you go on a bit of a journey playing the game, finding your Taskmaster equivalent if friends along the way, you start to understand it. 
…
But like Oz, was it ever real?

Such an amazing game, especially for a longtime fan of the show. I was fan-girling over everything and squealing, so cool to be "in the house, on the property, and in the studio". Haha it was so fun to be belittled by Greg, Alex REALLY is annoying 😅 and I understand the contestants all the more. Most of them at least lol. The tasks were fun and it is challenging, the controls are a little jenky and it did make me a bit sick but it was 100% worth it to me! Can't wait to play again. 🥰🥰🥰 Also love all the easter eggs throughout "Brace! Brace!" So fun!! Thank you guys for recording your voices and to everyone involved in the process. So awesome.

developer_response.body: Hi there! We released a patch this week addressing a large number of reported issues that were affecting some users and not others - hopefully this most recent update solves your issues, and you can play the game as we intended! We'd also encourage you to join our discord to share your feedback with the devs to help us continue to work on improvements to the game!
